body:
This PR
 - Adds microbenchmarks, which apply `BenchmarkTools.@benchmark` to individual thermo constructor calls
 - utilities, in `perf/common_micro_bm.jl` for extracting constructor inputs for various conditions (e.g., dry, moist, inputs that require saturation adjustment, and freezing)

It's a bit easier to identify certain issues (e.g., allocations) when calling a single constructor because we can see that allocations can be eliminated. Also, the added tools should be very easy to extend for all of our constructors.

This should help more precisely identify where we experience performance issues, and some of this will also be useful for applying JET to different conditions (which we can add in a later PR). PrettyTables is used to tabulate the results for each constructor + condition:

```
┌───────────────────────────┬───────────┬──────────┬────────────┬────────────┬────────────┬────────────┬───────────┐
│ Constructor               │    Memory │   allocs │       Time │       Time │       Time │       Time │ N-samples │
│ (+conditions)             │  estimate │ estimate │        min │        max │       mean │     median │           │
├───────────────────────────┼───────────┼──────────┼────────────┼────────────┼────────────┼────────────┼───────────┤
│ PhaseEquil_ρeq_dry        │   0 bytes │        0 │ 272.610 ns │ 497.890 ns │ 273.817 ns │ 272.969 ns │     10000 │
│ PhaseEquil_ρeq_sat_adjust │ 176 bytes │        6 │   1.831 μs │   4.441 μs │   1.883 μs │   1.841 μs │     10000 │
│ PhaseEquil_peq_dry        │   0 bytes │        0 │ 273.433 ns │   4.096 μs │ 275.223 ns │ 273.987 ns │     10000 │
│ PhaseEquil_peq_sat_adjust │   0 bytes │        0 │   5.576 μs │  38.949 μs │   5.612 μs │   5.583 μs │     10000 │
│ PhaseEquil_pθq_dry        │   0 bytes │        0 │ 385.695 ns │ 509.069 ns │ 388.378 ns │ 387.079 ns │     10000 │
│ PhaseEquil_pθq_sat_adjust │   0 bytes │        0 │   2.104 μs │   3.626 μs │   2.113 μs │   2.106 μs │     10000 │
│ PhaseEquil_pTq_dry        │   0 bytes │        0 │ 142.900 ns │ 173.041 ns │ 143.615 ns │ 143.207 ns │     10000 │
│ PhaseEquil_pTq_moist      │   0 bytes │        0 │ 142.904 ns │ 182.007 ns │ 143.596 ns │ 143.171 ns │     10000 │
└───────────────────────────┴───────────┴──────────┴────────────┴────────────┴────────────┴────────────┴───────────┘
```
title: Add microbenchmarks

body: This should help with experimenting / identifying why the `PhaseEquil_ρeq` is allocating (which is significantly worse in #100, for some reason).
title: Add JET tests

body: The new release of RootSolvers.jl should allow us to remove the broken tests 🎉
title: Fix broken tests via upgrading RootSolvers
